title: Aurora, 33723, Palm Pals Flapjack Stingray 5In, Soft Toy, Grey & White
features: Introducing Palm Pals Flapjack Stingray, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Flapjack can be seen doodling and painting on the ocean floor. Their inspiration comes from the colourful reefs and the fish that swim nearby. It is a grey and white coloured cute and cuddly stingray soft toy, filled with beans that perfectly fit in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. Flapjack Stingray is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable Flapjack Stingray soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Aquatic collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Whimsical and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Flapjack Stingray measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, Everyone will fall in love with this adorable grey and white coloured stingray which has a cute smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Introducing Palm Pals Flapjack Stingray, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Flapjack can be seen doodling and painting on the ocean floor. Their inspiration comes from the colourful reefs and the fish that swim nearby. It is a grey and white coloured cute and cuddly stingray soft toy, filled with beans that perfectly fit in your hand. This adorable Flapjack Stingray soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Aquatic collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Whimsical and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Flapjack Stingray soft toy measures 13cm. These gorgeous and irresistibly cute toys make great gifts for any occasion whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable stingray which has a cute smiling face. Our hangtags are recyclable and cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience designing and manufacturing innovative, high-quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
